title: unsign's better vanilla
description: A small modpack that consist some of perfomance, quality and QoL mods
body:
This modpack brings vanilla experience and enhances it, by improving perfomance and quality of minecraft.

### Some of the features:
- More sounds
- Voice chat
- More trailer-like look
- …and more!

The modpack is optimized for multiplayer experience, also allowing to join any server that supports vanilla clients.
